name: Lentil Stew Creole
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Green beans, fresh, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 can Tomatoes (16 oz), no salt added, quartered and juice reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except lentils and Tabasco sauce (if using) in a saucepan.
2. Heat partly covered until the mixture boils.
3. Reduce heat to low; simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add lentils and simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes.
5. Add a few drops of Tabasco sauce, if desired.
6. Serve over cooked brown rice.
Per serving: 81 cal; 4 g prot; 14 g carb; 1 g fat; 78 mg sod; 0 mg chol
